title: Dungeon Master Madarame: Playing by the Rules Wasn’t Going to Work, so I Decided to Build a Casino
description:
A lone genius gambler, Madara Metakashi, suddenly finds himself in another world.  Upon his arrival, he was burdened with an absurd challenge: to accumulate Ten Billion Dungeon Points by running his own self-made dungeon.

Despite numerous unreasonable and unfair rules, his gambling expertise, forged through high-stakes gambling, makes outsmarting the system a child's play.

Together with his hardworking partner Kerama, what he creates is... the most unorthodox among unorthodox dungeons... a dazzling, luxurious casino dungeon that doesn't kill people, but traps them in addiction!!

"Go ahead and enjoy yourself in my dungeon, [Paradise]."

From slot machines to hot springs, and even a buffet...What kind of dungeon is this?!

The unorthodox gambler's dungeon-management survival story begins now!
author: Ariyama Ryou
